status.no_hint: No applicable technique on the current board.

confirm.new_game_message: Your current progress will be lost.

lesson.no_example: No example board ready for this lesson yet.
lesson.no_step: No applicable technique found on the example board.
lesson.mismatch: The first step on this example is [{{actual}}]. The lesson will use that technique.

naked_single.name: Naked Single
naked_single.step: Cell at row {{row}}, column {{col}} can only be {{digit}}.

locked_candidates_pointing.name: Pointing
locked_candidates_pointing.step: In box {{box}}, {{digit}} is locked to a single $t(units.{{line}}); it can be eliminated from {{digit}}'s cells in $t(units.{{line}}) {{lineIndex}} outside the box.

locked_candidates_claiming.name: Claiming
locked_candidates_claiming.step: In $t(units.{{line}}) {{lineIndex}}, {{digit}} is confined to box {{box}}; it can be eliminated from the rest of that box.

naked_pair.name: Naked Pair
naked_pair.step: In $t(units.{{unit}}) {{unitIndex}}, two cells share only candidates {{digits}}; those digits can be eliminated from the other cells in this unit.

hidden_pair.name: Hidden Pair
hidden_pair.step: In $t(units.{{unit}}) {{unitIndex}}, candidates {{digits}} appear only in the same two cells; other candidates in those cells can be eliminated.

naked_triple.name: Naked Triple
naked_triple.step: In $t(units.{{unit}}) {{unitIndex}}, three cells together hold exactly candidates {{digits}}; those digits can be eliminated from other cells in this unit.

hidden_triple.name: Hidden Triple
hidden_triple.step: In $t(units.{{unit}}) {{unitIndex}}, candidates {{digits}} appear only in the same three cells; other candidates in those cells can be eliminated.

naked_quad.name: Naked Quad
naked_quad.step: In $t(units.{{unit}}) {{unitIndex}}, four cells together hold exactly candidates {{digits}}; those digits can be eliminated from other cells in this unit.

hidden_quad.name: Hidden Quad
hidden_quad.step: In $t(units.{{unit}}) {{unitIndex}}, candidates {{digits}} appear only in the same four cells; other candidates in those cells can be eliminated.

x_wing.name: X-Wing
x_wing.step: Digit {{digit}} appears in exactly the same two positions ({{cover1}}, {{cover2}}) across two lines ({{base1}} and {{base2}}). So {{digit}} can be eliminated from those positions in the other lines.
